question: An older config sets `camunda.client.zeebe.defaults.auto-complete=false` for all job workers. Which Camunda 8.8 property replaces it directly?

a.text: The deprecation table for `camunda.client.zeebe.defaults` maps `auto-complete` directly to `camunda.client.worker.defaults.auto-complete` (env `CAMUNDA_CLIENT_WORKER_DEFAULTS_AUTOCOMPLETE`).

b.text: `camunda.client.zeebe.*` is itself deprecated; worker defaults are migrating out of that namespace, not into a shorter form under it.

c.text: There is no top-level `camunda.client.auto-complete` property; the setting is scoped to job worker defaults.

d.text: The defaults block lives under `camunda.client.worker.defaults`, not directly under `camunda.client.worker`. Per-job-type overrides live under `worker.override.<job-type>`.

explanation: Default settings for all job workers have moved from `camunda.client.zeebe.defaults.*` to `camunda.client.worker.defaults.*`. Leaf property names are preserved during the rename, so `auto-complete` continues to control whether the SDK completes jobs automatically after the worker method returns.

docs.title: Camunda Spring Boot Starter - properties reference
